Home / Projects / MIT Transfer Station
Project Type Industrial Construction
Location Auburn, WA
Sector Industrial / Waste Management

MIT Transfer Station

Industrial construction demands an entirely different set of capabilities than retail or office work. The MIT Transfer Station project showcases Northway's expertise in heavy-duty industrial construction, delivering a purpose-built facility designed to handle the rigorous demands of waste transfer operations.

This project required industrial-grade construction from the ground up. We delivered reinforced foundations capable of supporting heavy equipment and constant vehicle traffic, structural systems designed for durability and long service life, and specialized features including drainage systems, containment areas, and heavy-duty access points for commercial waste hauling vehicles.

Transfer stations operate in demanding environments where facilities must withstand constant use, heavy loads, and challenging conditions. Our construction meets these requirements through robust structural design, industrial-grade materials, and attention to the operational workflows that make such facilities function efficiently. Every element—from site grading and drainage to vehicle circulation and equipment placement—was engineered for the specific demands of waste management operations.

Project Highlights

  • Heavy-duty industrial construction built for demanding operations
  • Reinforced foundations supporting heavy equipment and vehicle traffic
  • Specialized drainage and containment systems for industrial use
  • Efficient vehicle circulation for commercial hauling operations
  • Industrial-grade materials and structural systems for longevity
  • Comprehensive site work and utility coordination
  • Construction meeting stringent environmental and safety standards

The MIT Transfer Station project demonstrates Northway's versatility across commercial construction sectors. Whether it's polished retail spaces or rugged industrial facilities, we bring the same commitment to quality, functionality, and client service to every project.

Project Images
